  "text": "The Kafka inter-broker replication protocol is implemented across several key files in the sg-evals/kafka--0753c489 repository:\n\n## ReplicaFetcherThread\n- **`core/src/main/scala/kafka/server/ReplicaFetcherThread.scala`**: The concrete implementation of the follower-side fetcher. It extends AbstractFetcherThread and overrides `logStartOffset` to return the local replica's log start offset. It handles appending fetched records and updating the high watermark.\n- **`core/src/main/scala/kafka/server/AbstractFetcherThread.scala`**: The abstract base class for all fetcher threads. Contains the core fetch loop, truncation logic, offset truncation state handling, and the abstract `logStartOffset` method. Implements leader epoch-based truncation (OffsetsForLeaderEpoch).\n- **`core/src/main/scala/kafka/server/ReplicaFetcherManager.scala`**: Manages the pool of ReplicaFetcherThread instances, creating and destroying them as partitions are added/removed.\n- **`core/src/main/scala/kafka/server/RemoteLeaderEndPoint.scala`**: The network-facing leader endpoint used by ReplicaFetcherThread to communicate with the remote leader broker via blocking sends.\n- **`core/src/main/scala/kafka/server/LocalLeaderEndPoint.scala`**: Local (same-broker) leader endpoint used by ReplicaAlterLogDirsThread.\n- **`core/src/main/scala/kafka/server/ReplicaAlterLogDirsThread.scala`**: Similar to ReplicaFetcherThread but for inter-log-directory replication on the same broker.\n\n## LeaderEpochFileCache\n- **`storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/epoch/LeaderEpochFileCache.java`**: The core implementation of the leader epoch cache. Persists and serves the mapping from leader epoch to the first offset of the next epoch. Used for truncation decisions during follower recovery.\n- **`storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/checkpoint/LeaderEpochCheckpointFile.java`**: Handles reading/writing the leader epoch checkpoint file on disk (format: version + list of epoch/offset pairs).\n- **`storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/EpochEntry.java`**: Data class representing a (epoch, startOffset) entry in the epoch cache.\n\n## LogStartOffset Tracking\n- **`storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/LogStartOffsetIncrementReason.java`**: Enum for the reason a log start offset is incremented (leader offset incremented, segment deletion, etc.).\n- **`storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/UnifiedLog.java`**: Contains `maybeIncrementLogStartOffset` and `maybeIncrementLocalLogStartOffset` which update the log start offset and checkpoint it. The `logStartOffset` volatile field is tracked here.\n- **`core/src/main/scala/kafka/log/LogManager.scala`**: Implements `checkpointLogStartOffsets` and `checkpointLogStartOffsetsInDir` which persist log start offsets to the `log-start-offset-checkpoint` file across all log directories.\n- **`storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/LogLoader.java`**: Uses the log start offset and leader epoch cache during log recovery.\n- **`storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/LogSegment.java`**: Individual log segment recovery updates the leader epoch cache.\n\n## ISR Shrink/Expand Mechanism\n- **`core/src/main/scala/kafka/cluster/Partition.scala`**: Contains the ISR management logic: `maybeShrinkIsr()` and `maybeExpandIsr()`, plus the state classes `PendingShrinkIsr` and `PendingExpandIsr`. The `AlterPartitionListener` trait is also defined here with `markIsrExpand()` and `markIsrShrink()` callbacks.\n- **`core/src/main/scala/kafka/server/ReplicaManager.scala`**: Schedules periodic `maybeShrinkIsr()` calls on all online partitions. Maintains ISR metrics (`isrExpandRate`, `isrShrinkRate`, `failedIsrUpdatesRate`).\n- **`core/src/main/scala/kafka/server/AlterPartitionManager.scala`**: Defines the `AlterPartitionManager` trait and `DefaultAlterPartitionManager` implementation. Responsible for sending AlterPartition requests to the controller when ISR changes are requested by a partition leader.\n- **`core/src/main/java/kafka/server/TierStateMachine.java`**: State machine for tiered storage that interacts with leader epoch checkpoints during log segment tiering."
}

  "text": "The Kafka inter-broker replication protocol is implemented across several key files in the sg-evals/kafka--0753c489 repository:\n\n## ReplicaFetcherThread\n- `core/src/main/scala/kafka/server/ReplicaFetcherThread.scala`: The concrete follower-side fetcher implementation. Extends AbstractFetcherThread; overrides `logStartOffset` to return the local replica log start offset and handles appending fetched records plus high watermark updates.\n- `core/src/main/scala/kafka/server/AbstractFetcherThread.scala`: Abstract base class for all fetcher threads. Contains the core fetch loop, leader-epoch-based truncation logic (OffsetsForLeaderEpoch), offset truncation state, and the abstract `logStartOffset` method.\n- `core/src/main/scala/kafka/server/ReplicaFetcherManager.scala`: Manages the pool of ReplicaFetcherThread instances, creating/destroying threads as partitions are assigned or removed.\n- `core/src/main/scala/kafka/server/RemoteLeaderEndPoint.scala`: Network-facing leader endpoint used by ReplicaFetcherThread to communicate with a remote leader broker.\n- `core/src/main/scala/kafka/server/LocalLeaderEndPoint.scala`: Local leader endpoint for same-broker inter-log-dir replication.\n- `core/src/main/scala/kafka/server/ReplicaAlterLogDirsThread.scala`: Fetcher thread variant for inter-log-directory replication on the same broker.\n\n## LeaderEpochFileCache\n- `storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/epoch/LeaderEpochFileCache.java`: Core implementation of the leader epoch cache. Persists and queries the mapping from leader epoch to the start offset of the next epoch. Used by followers to determine correct truncation points.\n- `storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/checkpoint/LeaderEpochCheckpointFile.java`: Reads/writes the on-disk leader epoch checkpoint file (format: version + epoch/offset entries).\n- `storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/EpochEntry.java`: Data class for a (epoch, startOffset) entry in the epoch cache.\n\n## LogStartOffset Tracking\n- `storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/LogStartOffsetIncrementReason.java`: Enum for log start offset increment reasons (LeaderOffsetIncremented, SegmentDeletion, etc.).\n- `storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/UnifiedLog.java`: Contains `maybeIncrementLogStartOffset` and `maybeIncrementLocalLogStartOffset` for tracking and checkpointing the log start offset.\n- `core/src/main/scala/kafka/log/LogManager.scala`: Implements `checkpointLogStartOffsets` / `checkpointLogStartOffsetsInDir` to persist log start offsets to the `log-start-offset-checkpoint` file.\n- `storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/LogLoader.java`: Uses log start offset and leader epoch cache during log recovery after a broker restart.\n- `storage/src/main/java/org/apache/kafka/storage/internals/log/LogSegment.java`: Segment-level recovery updates the leader epoch cache.\n\n## ISR Shrink/Expand Mechanism\n- `core/src/main/scala/kafka/cluster/Partition.scala`: Central ISR state machine. Tracks ISR metrics (`isrExpandRate`, `isrShrinkRate`, `failedIsrUpdatesRate`).\n- `core/src/main/scala/kafka/server/AlterPartitionManager.scala`: Defines `AlterPartitionManager` trait and `DefaultAlterPartitionManager`. It handles appending fetched records and updating the high watermark.\n- **`core/src/main/scala/kafka/server/AbstractFetcherThread.scala`**: The abstract base class for all fetcher threads. Persists and serves the mapping from leader epoch to the first offset of the next epoch. Responsible for sending AlterPartition requests to the controller when ISR changes are requested by a partition leader.\n- **`core/src/main/java/kafka/server/TierStateMachine.java`**: State machine for tiered storage that interacts with leader epoch checkpoints during log segment tiering."
